ezechiel.d:
n a Hebrew prophet of the 6th century BC who was exiled to Babylon in 587 BC
n an Old Testament book containing Ezekiel's prophecies of the downfall of Jerusalem and Judah and their subsequent restoration

ezekias.d: n (Old Testament) king of Judah who abolished idolatry (715-687 BC)

ezra.d:

n. an Old Testament book telling of a rabbi's efforts in the 5th century BC to reconstitute Jewish law and worship in Jerusalem after the Babylonian Captivity
